diff: After the items are delivered to the Core Council Tracker, the [A.1.8.1.1 - Core Council Risk Advisor](d80c8f64-b3f6-430d-bf62-8e50a3783e73) conducts a pre-risk review of the proposed Prime Spell content. The pre-risk review identifies any preliminary risk concerns that should inform the Strategic Team's approval of Spell scope. The pre-risk review must be completed before the Strategic Team approval specified in [A.1.10.2.3.2.2.3.1.4 - Strategic Team Approves Spell Scope](05e33459-9ee6-430c-af72-13db2004c505).

before the Strategic Team approval specified in [A.1.10.2.3.2.2.3.1.
